name: Per-hole money (Story 3-3) — base flat $5/point, SAME scenario as guyan-2v2-base-flat.json. Exercises sign-cancellation: team A wins holes 1/2/4/6, team B wins 3/5, so the per-player ROUND net (+/-1500c) is far smaller than the sum of per-hole absolute swings — proving the loss-less proof must be the per-player SIGNED sum, never an abs-of-per-hole relation.
_contract: Golden HAND-CALC fixture for Story 3-3 per-hole money. The per-hole `teamPointsA` values are copied verbatim from the JOSH-APPROVED hand-calc in guyan-2v2-base-flat.json (h1..h6 = +1/+3/-4/+4/-5/+4). Per-player per-hole cents = teamPointsA*pv for a teamA player, negated for teamB (pv=500c flat). Loss-less invariant: for every player, SUM over holes of perHole.perPlayerCents === ledger.perPlayerCents (the already-approved round net). Approved by Josh at the 3-3 spec gate 2026-06-23.
_handCalc: pv=500c flat. teamPointsA per hole (from the approved guyan-2v2-base-flat hand-calc): h1=+1 h2=+3 h3=-4 h4=+4 h5=-5 h6=+4. Per teamA player = teamPointsA*500; per teamB player = -(teamPointsA*500). PER-PLAYER ROUND SUM a1 = 500+1500-2000+2000-2500+2000 = +1500c (+$15); b1 = -1500c. Matches the already-approved round ledger (+/-1500c). SIGN-CANCELLATION CHECK: sum of |per-hole teamASignedPerPlayerCents| = 500+1500+2000+2000+2500+2000 = 10500c, which is NOT 1500c and NOT totalCents/2 (1500) — confirming only the SIGNED per-player sum is loss-less. Every hole is settled (all four nets present), so 6 rows; no push, no incomplete row in this scenario.
